programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్

programme.title: Wizards of Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स ऑफ वेवर्ली प्लेस
விஸார்ட்ஸ் ஆஃப் வேவர்லி பிளேஸ்
విజార్డ్స్ ఆఫ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Alex, Justin and Max Russo have descended from a long line of wizards. They must compete with each other in order to become the sole wizard of their family and hiding their abilities from the world.
एलेक्स, जस्टिन और मैक्स रूसो जादूगरों की एक लंबी परंपरा से निकले हैं। उन्हें अपने परिवार का एकमात्र जादूगर बनने और अपनी क्षमताओं को दुनिया से छिपाने के लिए एक-दूसरे से प्रतिस्पर्धा करनी होगी।
மந்திர சக்திகளையுடைய மூவர் குடும்பத்தின் ஒரே மந்திரவாதி ஆக மாற, தங்கள் திறன்களை மறைத்து ஒருவருக்கொருவர் மோத வேண்டும்.
న్యూయార్క్ లో ఉండే రుస్సోకుటుంబయజమాని మంత్రగాడుకావడంతో పిల్లలు కూడానేర్చుకుంటారు,అందులోనేర్పరికి మంత్రదండం ఇవ్వబడుతుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
हन्ना मोंटाना
ஹானா மோன்டானா
హన్నా మోంటానా
programme.desc: Miley Stewart, an average teenage girl, lives a double life as a famous pop singer named Hannah Montana and constantly tries to conceal her true identity from the public.
माइली स्टीवर्ट, एक औसत किशोरी लड़की, हन्ना मोंटाना नामक एक प्रसिद्ध पॉप गायिका के रूप में दोहरी जिंदगी जीती है और लगातार अपनी असली पहचान जनता से छिपाने की कोशिश करती है।
பிரபல பாடகியான மைலி, ஹானா மோன்டனா பெயரில் இரட்டை வாழ்க்கை வாழ்வதோடு, தனது உண்மையான அடையாளத்தை மறைக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்.
మైలీ స్టీవర్ట్ అనే ఒక సాధారణ అమ్మాయి, హన్నా మోంటానా అనే ప్రసిద్ధ పాప్ సింగర్‌గా ద్వంద్వ జీవితాన్ని గడుపుతుంది.

programme.title: Hannah Montana

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ
programme.desc: Three brothers, Teddy, Casey, and Gabe, whose parents enlist their help when they return to work after the birth of their fourth child, Charlie.
डंकन की ज़िंदगी में उथल-पुथल मचता है, जब वे अपने चौथे बच्चे, चार्ली का स्वागत करते हैं। हालाँकि, अराजकता होती है जब टेडी, पीजे और गेब अपने माता-पिता की अनुपस्थिति में चार्ली की देखभाल करते हैं।
டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स बिऑन्ड वेवर्ली प्लेस
விசார்ட்ஸ் பியாண்ட் வேவர்லி ப்ளேஸ்
విజర్డ్స్ బియాండ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Justin Russo must shed his mortality in order to mentor his wizard niece, Billie, and help her get her powers under control.
जस्टिन रूसो को अपनी जादूगरनी भतीजी बिली का मार्गदर्शन करने और उसकी शक्तियों को नियंत्रित करने में मदद करने के लिए अपनी नश्वरता को त्यागना होगा।
ஜஸ்டின் ருஸ்ஸோ, மந்திரவாதி மருமகள் பில்லிக்கு வழிகாட்டவும், சக்திகளை கட்டுக்குள் கொண்டு வரவும் மரணத்தை கைவிட வேண்டும்.
మాంత్రికురాలైన తన మేనకోడలు బిల్లీకి మార్గదర్శకత్వం వహించడానికి జస్టిన్ రస్సో తన అమరత్వాన్ని వదులుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ
programme.desc: Three brothers, Teddy, Casey, and Gabe, whose parents enlist their help when they return to work after the birth of their fourth child, Charlie.
डंकन की ज़िंदगी में उथल-पुथल मचता है, जब वे अपने चौथे बच्चे, चार्ली का स्वागत करते हैं। हालाँकि, अराजकता होती है जब टेडी, पीजे और गेब अपने माता-पिता की अनुपस्थिति में चार्ली की देखभाल करते हैं।
டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ
programme.desc: Three brothers, Teddy, Casey, and Gabe, whose parents enlist their help when they return to work after the birth of their fourth child, Charlie.
डंकन की ज़िंदगी में उथल-पुथल मचता है, जब वे अपने चौथे बच्चे, चार्ली का स्वागत करते हैं। हालाँकि, अराजकता होती है जब टेडी, पीजे और गेब अपने माता-पिता की अनुपस्थिति में चार्ली की देखभाल करते हैं।
டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ

డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Secrets of Sulphur Springs
सीक्रेट्स ऑफ सल्फर स्प्रिंग्स
சீக்ரெட்ஸ் ஆஃப் சல்பர் ஸ்ப்ரிங்ஸ்
సీక్రెట్స్ ఆఫ్ సల్ఫర్ స్ప్రింగ్స్
programme.desc: After moving to a haunted town, Griffin and his classmate Harper discover a portal that allows them to travel through time. Together, they uncover dark secrets while encountering a restless ghost.
एक प्रेतवाधित शहर में जाने के बाद, ग्रिफिन और हार्पर को समय में यात्रा करने वाला पोर्टल मिलता है। जिससे वह कई गहरे रहस्यों का पर्दाफाश करते हैं।
பேய் உள்ள நகரத்திற்கு குடிபெயர்ந்த கிரிஃபினும் ஹார்ப்பரும், அங்கு பேயைச் சந்தித்து, இருண்ட ரகசியங்களைக் கண்டறிகிறார்கள்.
దెయ్యాలున్న పట్టణానికి వెళ్ళిన తర్వాత, గ్రిఫిన్, హార్పర్ కాలంలో ప్రయాణించడానికి వీలు కల్పించే ఒక ద్వారాన్ని కనుగొంటారు.

programme.title: Secrets of Sulphur Springs
सीक्रेट्स ऑफ सल्फर स्प्रिंग्स

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Wizards of Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स ऑफ वेवर्ली प्लेस
விஸார்ட்ஸ் ஆஃப் வேவர்லி பிளேஸ்
విజార్డ్స్ ఆఫ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Alex, Justin and Max Russo have descended from a long line of wizards. They must compete with each other in order to become the sole wizard of their family and hiding their abilities from the world.
एलेक्स, जस्टिन और मैक्स रूसो जादूगरों की एक लंबी परंपरा से निकले हैं। उन्हें अपने परिवार का एकमात्र जादूगर बनने और अपनी क्षमताओं को दुनिया से छिपाने के लिए एक-दूसरे से प्रतिस्पर्धा करनी होगी।
மந்திர சக்திகளையுடைய மூவர் குடும்பத்தின் ஒரே மந்திரவாதி ஆக மாற, தங்கள் திறன்களை மறைத்து ஒருவருக்கொருவர் மோத வேண்டும்.
న్యూయార్క్ లో ఉండే రుస్సోకుటుంబయజమాని మంత్రగాడుకావడంతో పిల్లలు కూడానేర్చుకుంటారు,అందులోనేర్పరికి మంత్రదండం ఇవ్వబడుతుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।

సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।

సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
हन्ना मोंटाना
ஹானா மோன்டானா
హన్నా మోంటానా
programme.desc: Miley Stewart, an average teenage girl, lives a double life as a famous pop singer named Hannah Montana and constantly tries to conceal her true identity from the public.
माइली स्टीवर्ट, एक औसत किशोरी लड़की, हन्ना मोंटाना नामक एक प्रसिद्ध पॉप गायिका के रूप में दोहरी जिंदगी जीती है और लगातार अपनी असली पहचान जनता से छिपाने की कोशिश करती है।
பிரபல பாடகியான மைலி, ஹானா மோன்டனா பெயரில் இரட்டை வாழ்க்கை வாழ்வதோடு, தனது உண்மையான அடையாளத்தை மறைக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்.
మైలీ స్టీవర్ట్ అనే ఒక సాధారణ అమ్మాయి, హన్నా మోంటానా అనే ప్రసిద్ధ పాప్ సింగర్‌గా ద్వంద్వ జీవితాన్ని గడుపుతుంది.

programme.title: Hannah Montana

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ
programme.desc: Three brothers, Teddy, Casey, and Gabe, whose parents enlist their help when they return to work after the birth of their fourth child, Charlie.
डंकन की ज़िंदगी में उथल-पुथल मचता है, जब वे अपने चौथे बच्चे, चार्ली का स्वागत करते हैं। हालाँकि, अराजकता होती है जब टेडी, पीजे और गेब अपने माता-पिता की अनुपस्थिति में चार्ली की देखभाल करते हैं।
டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स बिऑन्ड वेवर्ली प्लेस
விசார்ட்ஸ் பியாண்ட் வேவர்லி ப்ளேஸ்
విజర్డ్స్ బియాండ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Justin Russo must shed his mortality in order to mentor his wizard niece, Billie, and help her get her powers under control.
जस्टिन रूसो को अपनी जादूगरनी भतीजी बिली का मार्गदर्शन करने और उसकी शक्तियों को नियंत्रित करने में मदद करने के लिए अपनी नश्वरता को त्यागना होगा।
ஜஸ்டின் ருஸ்ஸோ, மந்திரவாதி மருமகள் பில்லிக்கு வழிகாட்டவும், சக்திகளை கட்டுக்குள் கொண்டு வரவும் மரணத்தை கைவிட வேண்டும்.
మాంత్రికురాలైన తన మేనకోడలు బిల్లీకి మార్గదర్శకత్వం వహించడానికి జస్టిన్ రస్సో తన అమరత్వాన్ని వదులుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ
programme.desc: Three brothers, Teddy, Casey, and Gabe, whose parents enlist their help when they return to work after the birth of their fourth child, Charlie.
डंकन की ज़िंदगी में उथल-पुथल मचता है, जब वे अपने चौथे बच्चे, चार्ली का स्वागत करते हैं। हालाँकि, अराजकता होती है जब टेडी, पीजे और गेब अपने माता-पिता की अनुपस्थिति में चार्ली की देखभाल करते हैं।
டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

குட் லக் சார்லி

programme.title: Secrets of Sulphur Springs
सीक्रेट्स ऑफ सल्फर स्प्रिंग्स
சீக்ரெட்ஸ் ஆஃப் சல்பர் ஸ்ப்ரிங்ஸ்
సీక్రెట్స్ ఆఫ్ సల్ఫర్ స్ప్రింగ్స్
programme.desc: After moving to a haunted town, Griffin and his classmate Harper discover a portal that allows them to travel through time. Together, they uncover dark secrets while encountering a restless ghost.
एक प्रेतवाधित शहर में जाने के बाद, ग्रिफिन और हार्पर को समय में यात्रा करने वाला पोर्टल मिलता है। जिससे वह कई गहरे रहस्यों का पर्दाफाश करते हैं।
பேய் உள்ள நகரத்திற்கு குடிபெயர்ந்த கிரிஃபினும் ஹார்ப்பரும், அங்கு பேயைச் சந்தித்து, இருண்ட ரகசியங்களைக் கண்டறிகிறார்கள்.
దెయ్యాలున్న పట్టణానికి వెళ్ళిన తర్వాత, గ్రిఫిన్, హార్పర్ కాలంలో ప్రయాణించడానికి వీలు కల్పించే ఒక ద్వారాన్ని కనుగొంటారు.

programme.title: Secrets of Sulphur Springs
सीक्रेट्स ऑफ सल्फर स्प्रिंग्स

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Peter's: Gordon visits Peter's Italian Restaurant in New York, where the peace of Long Island is shattered by the antics of the volatile Pellegrino family who run the place. (S1 Ep1) [S,SL]

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours in Marseille
programme.desc: Join Asim Chaudhry and Joe Lycett for le weekend in Marseille. Expect street food, skateboarding, submerged sculpture, and spectacular sights from atop the Basilica Notre-Dame de la Garde. [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: Like a Boss
programme.desc: (2020) Comedy with Tiffany Haddish and Rose Byrne. When two friends' beauty business gets into dire financial difficulty, they turn to a scary CEO for help. [S,SL]

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home

programme.title: Mission to the Moon
programme.desc: In the international race to the moon, the Norwegian mission is led by brilliant inventor Reodor from the village of Flaklypa. With Louis the Magpie as the brave astronaut, what could possibly go wrong? Quite a bit, actually – on the daring mission, secret passengers are discovered, hidden agendas are revealed, and nothing seems to work out the way it was planned. Louis and his friend Luca the Hedgehog are in for some surprises on their trip to the moon. The third film in the stop-motion trilogy featuring the beloved characters from the Flaklypa universe.

programme.title: Spy Cat
programme.desc: Four crazy anti-heroes, one pawsome adventure. Join special-agent Marnie and her friends as they team up and fight crime. Spoiled and innocent, chubby house cat Marnie lives a comfortable and pampered life in the Sunshine household. She has never ventured outside the family home and only knows about the real world through her favourite detective, crime TV-shows.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy Lupin manages to convince the pack elders to let him sit Howlington Academy’s entrance test. Freddy must use all his poodle wits- and his best friend Batty’s help!- to win a place at the historically wolf-only academy.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: It’s the first day of school, and Freddy immediately comes into conflict with bully Ivan, who blackmails him into stealing the sacred moonstone! But when Batty is exposed to the moonstone, she’s turned into a human girl!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy attempts to teach Batty how to be human, while searching for a cure for her new form. A class assignment to capture the mysterious ‘Golden Horn’ and prove who the ‘alpha’ wolf is goes awry when a wilderwolf attacks!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy becomes convinced that there’s a wilderwolf at Howlington, and launches a daring investigation to prove that it’s the school accountant, Mr Sminch. Howlington gets a new teacher, the super cool and charming Ric Rawls.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: The kids are struck down by a flea infestation, and Freddy and Batty are tasked with tracking down the mysterious Doog, keeper of the Fleaminator, the most powerful flea treatment known to dog, before they’re all expelled!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: The kids head out on their first excursion to Night Patrol HQ. Freddy gets pulled into Scarlet’s world as she gets closer to the truth about werewolves and the two bond when they get stuck in the forest while tracking a wolf.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: It’s Howloween, and Howlington is on lockdown. But when the students stage a play that goes wrong and the lockdown is disrupted, it will be up to the kids to save the grown-ups from themselves - including Principal Pincus!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy and Ivan have failed their runes exam and have to do it over - or they won’t be allowed to attend the Doom Wolves concert. But their study session ends up putting themselves, and the Doom Wolves, in grave danger!

programme.title: Back to the Sea
programme.desc: When little fish Kevin is swept up in a net and taken from his home in the vast oceans to the small glass fish tank of a restaurant, he must find a way to escape and make his way back home.

programme.title: Racetime
programme.desc: Frankie and Sophie challenge newcomers Zac and Charlie to an epic sled race.

programme.title: Son of Bigfoot
programme.desc: A teenage boy journeys to find his missing father only to discover that he's actually Bigfoot.

programme.title: Ozzy
programme.desc: The lovable Ozzy’s pampered life is thrown into turmoil after his family drops him at Blue Creek before their vacation. Ozzy quickly learns that Blue Creek is a dog prison and he’ll need to rely on some new friends to help him break out and get back home.

programme.title: Stardog & Turbocat
programme.desc: A loyal dog and a vigilante cat embark on a space age voyage to find their way home.

programme.title: Rally Road Racers
programme.desc: A rookie race-car driver gets the opportunity to compete against the reigning champion. With help from a former driver, he must overcome treacherous terrain, rival racers and unexpected obstacles to prove he has what it takes.

programme.title: Cats
programme.desc: A cat named Blanket lives in the city with his son, Cape. One day, Cape decides to leave home and embarks on an adventure to find the legendary cat's paradise. To find his son, Blanket must overcome his fear and reconcile with his past.

programme.title: Tall Tales
programme.desc: When his beloved Queen bee Marguerite is kidnapped, vagabond cricket Apollo who has been framed for the crime, teams up with the other bugs to save the Queen and the entire kingdom.

programme.title: Luis and the Aliens
programme.desc: A boy at risk of being sent to boarding school by his Dad - and three aliens stranded due to watching too much TV - must help each other out.

programme.desc: After purchasing a mysterious shrink ray machine, Vick accidentally shrinks Briar, Bramble, and himself. The tiny team must put aside their differences and embark on one big journey to restore their size and their friendship.

Louis and his friend Luca the Hedgehog are in for some surprises on their trip to the moon. The third film in the stop-motion trilogy featuring the beloved characters from the Flaklypa universe.

programme.title: Spy Cat
programme.desc: Four crazy anti-heroes, one pawsome adventure. Join special-agent Marnie and her friends as they team up and fight crime. Spoiled and innocent, chubby house cat Marnie lives a comfortable and pampered life in the Sunshine household. She has never ventured outside the family home and only knows about the real world through her favourite detective, crime TV-shows.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy Lupin manages to convince the pack elders to let him sit Howlington Academy’s entrance test. Freddy must use all his poodle wits- and his best friend Batty’s help!- to win a place at the historically wolf-only academy.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: It’s the first day of school, and Freddy immediately comes into conflict with bully Ivan, who blackmails him into stealing the sacred moonstone! But when Batty is exposed to the moonstone, she’s turned into a human girl!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy attempts to teach Batty how to be human, while searching for a cure for her new form. A class assignment to capture the mysterious ‘Golden Horn’ and prove who the ‘alpha’ wolf is goes awry when a wilderwolf attacks!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy becomes convinced that there’s a wilderwolf at Howlington, and launches a daring investigation to prove that it’s the school accountant, Mr Sminch. Howlington gets a new teacher, the super cool and charming Ric Rawls.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: The kids are struck down by a flea infestation, and Freddy and Batty are tasked with tracking down the mysterious Doog, keeper of the Fleaminator, the most powerful flea treatment known to dog, before they’re all expelled!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: The kids head out on their first excursion to Night Patrol HQ. Freddy gets pulled into Scarlet’s world as she gets closer to the truth about werewolves and the two bond when they get stuck in the forest while tracking a wolf.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: It’s Howloween, and Howlington is on lockdown. But when the students stage a play that goes wrong and the lockdown is disrupted, it will be up to the kids to save the grown-ups from themselves - including Principal Pincus!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy and Ivan have failed their runes exam and have to do it over - or they won’t be allowed to attend the Doom Wolves concert. But their study session ends up putting themselves, and the Doom Wolves, in grave danger!

programme.title: Back to the Sea
programme.desc: When little fish Kevin is swept up in a net and taken from his home in the vast oceans to the small glass fish tank of a restaurant, he must find a way to escape and make his way back home.

programme.title: Racetime
programme.desc: Frankie and Sophie challenge newcomers Zac and Charlie to an epic sled race.

programme.title: Son of Bigfoot
programme.desc: A teenage boy journeys to find his missing father only to discover that he's actually Bigfoot.

programme.title: Ozzy
programme.desc: The lovable Ozzy’s pampered life is thrown into turmoil after his family drops him at Blue Creek before their vacation. Ozzy quickly learns that Blue Creek is a dog prison and he’ll need to rely on some new friends to help him break out and get back home.

programme.title: Stardog & Turbocat
programme.desc: A loyal dog and a vigilante cat embark on a space age voyage to find their way home.

programme.title: Rally Road Racers
programme.desc: A rookie race-car driver gets the opportunity to compete against the reigning champion. With help from a former driver, he must overcome treacherous terrain, rival racers and unexpected obstacles to prove he has what it takes.

programme.title: Cats
programme.desc: A cat named Blanket lives in the city with his son, Cape. One day, Cape decides to leave home and embarks on an adventure to find the legendary cat's paradise. To find his son, Blanket must overcome his fear and reconcile with his past.

programme.title: Tall Tales
programme.desc: When his beloved Queen bee Marguerite is kidnapped, vagabond cricket Apollo who has been framed for the crime, teams up with the other bugs to save the Queen and the entire kingdom.

programme.title: Luis and the Aliens
programme.desc: A boy at risk of being sent to boarding school by his Dad - and three aliens stranded due to watching too much TV - must help each other out.

programme.title: Boonie Bears : The Big Shrink
programme.desc: After purchasing a mysterious shrink ray machine, Vick accidentally shrinks Briar, Bramble, and himself. The tiny team must put aside their differences and embark on one big journey to restore their size and their friendship.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.sub-title: LEGO City Adventures Arrest Ye Merry Gentleman/Ride Along Kid
programme.desc: When Fendrich threatens to ruin Sinclair's Holiday Gala, Duke intervenes to save both the party and the holidays! Freya takes Billy and Mark on a ride-along, but when things get out of hand, it's up to Mark to save the day.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Owen and Claire must rescue a theme-park reviewer from a sabotaged aerialtram ... and a salivating T-Rex!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: While stranded in the jungle during a massive storm, Claire and Simon unknowingly stumble upon a clue to the whereabouts of the treasure sought by Sinjin.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: A terrified hybrid dinosaur rampages through the park, causing chaos and creating the cover for Danny and Sinjin as they try to steal the Nedry videotape!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: Ras attacks the Cloud Kingdom to obtain information on the Forbidden Five; Euphrasia informs the ninja and they set off to save the kingdom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Beyond the Phantasm Cave
programme.desc: Cinder and Jordana compete for Lord Ras's favour; the ninja set out to find a teacher who can defeat the Wolf Clan; Wyldfyre sneaks on the Destiny's Bounty.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Force From the East
programme.desc: The ninjas find two old dragon masters who agree to train them. Meanwhile, Ras invades the Land of Lost Things.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas’ lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly’s Boarding School, they discover it’s a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon’s new Mega-Weapon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth’s Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn’t have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock’ and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and turned into kids.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon travels back in time in order to undo the past and rid the Ninja from the future, the Ninja follow him and try to stop him by using the Golden Weapons from the past to clash against Garmadon’s Mega-Weapon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja face off with an exhibit of a Stone Samurai Warrior that the toxic venom from the Great Devourer has brought to life while Garmadon manages to find a fabled Dark Island that is said to hold dark powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja try to flee from the rest of the Stone Army that has been brought to life by the Devourer’s toxic venom - and things get a lot worse when Garmadon arrives with a ‘Helmet of Darkness’ and seizes control of the Stone Army.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninjas, Lloyd, Sensei Wu and Misako journey to the Dark Island to find a ‘Temple of Light’ that can restore the Ninjas’ elemental powers but are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like star fish) that start eating through their ship.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Each month there is a big market at the Speedor races. Laval and Eris go there, but Cragger has hired the Ravens to steal Laval’s precious Speedor. And suddenly the prize of the races, the Golden Chi, has also disappeared.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: The Crocodiles hire the Ravens to trick the Wolves into attacking the Eagle Spires. But it is all part of an elaborate plot to harm both the Lions, Eagles and Wolves. Laval and Eris must act quickly to save the day.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: At the night of the Hundred-Year Moon, the Wolves are running wild and causing havoc. Crooler kidnaps a young gorilla girl to lure Laval, Eris and Gorzan the Gorilla out to rescue her.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers rush to save Logan from the Shadowkeep's dungeon,but the liberators soon become the prisoners in a nightmarish twist of fate.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: A mysterious dome blocks Mateo and the others from leaving their dream landing, and Zoey and Albert are their only hope of escape.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: With Albert captured by the Night Hunter and Z-Blob detained by Agent Strick, it's time for a dual rescue in the Waking World and the Dream World!

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Detective Izzie takes the case of Mateo's missing comic book while Nova, the head of the Insomniacs, probes into a mystery of her own.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The hunt for the Sandman, the only one who can repair Lunia's hourglass, brings the kids to the dangerous Murky Realm, where memories go to die!

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Determined to give the Insomniac's a night of good dreams, Izzie and friends bring them to the Candy Realm; but nowhere is safe from Nightmare King.

programme.sub-title: LEGO City Adventures Small Carol/Last Man Floating
programme.desc: The Mayor and Carol work late when all manner of strange events begin to happen. Extreme Sports host, Dynamo, holds a competition to see who will go on the City Mars mission.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.sub-title: LEGO City Adventures Police Navidad/Evil Layers
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and Officer Duke DeTain is the only cop on patrol without a partner. Duke DeTain and Shirley Keeper investigate the true identity of the Master Criminal.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Firefighter Buster Lloyd gets the opportunity to live out his fantasy of being a police officer. Sanitation worker, Shirley Keeper, educates local residents on how to take care of their City.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.sub-title: LEGO Jurassic World The Haunted and the Hunted!
programme.desc: Something mysterious lurking in the jungle wrecks a construction site, and Hudson is convinced a ghost is responsible ... but it might be something even more surprising.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.sub-title: LEGO Jurassic World To the Extreme!
programme.desc: Danny releases an energy drink into the dinosaurs' water supply, making them extra-energetic ... and extra dangerous!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Rising Ninja

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Shape of Motion

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninjas’ attempt to return Garmadon’s ‘Helmet of Darkness’ to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: Fright Knight
programme.desc: Using the Book of Fear, Jestro calls forth Whipperella and uses her to trap the knights in the dark woods where they realize their darkest fears. Searching through the dark forests of the realm, Jestro finds “The Book of Fear.” It's pretty scary. But he feeds it to the book of Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, a monster that can induce fear. One-by-one she uses her “knighmarish” power on the knights and they experiences their own worst fears. Clay fears not living up to the Knights' Code. Lance fears being a nobody. Macy fears never being a knight and Axl fears having no food. Aaron must take the lead because he's fearless he does everything with reckless abandon. It's not until he leads the group out of the forest – as they fight off the Whipperella – that they we find out Aaron's true fear – the fear of peace and quiet and no more challenges or high energy escapades.

programme.title: Wild Ones
programme.desc: Wild Ones draws inspiration from the rhythms of nature, delving into the wonders of the animal kingdom. This captivating series explores the diverse behaviors that define survival—hunting and feeding strategies, family bonds, defense tactics, and the intricacies of courtship and mating. Who reigns supreme in the wild? Discover the untold stories of nature's fiercest competitors and most fascinating creatures.

programme.title: The Dog Dudes: Pack Power
programme.desc: Alannah's connection to her eight-year-old Jack Russell Terrier, Time, has been therapeutic for both of them, but this pint-sized pooch is wreaking havoc on her housing situation. If the Dog Dudes and the pack can't regain control of the situation, they will be looking for somewhere else to live.

programme.title: The Dog Dudes: Pack Power
programme.desc: Amanda loves her three-year old Pitbull/ Doberman, Frank. Frank takes his job as her protector very seriously...too seriously. Dudes will have their hands full with this protective Pitty but they and their pack of beautiful Huskies are up to the challenge.

programme.title: Wild Animal Rescue
programme.sub-title: Closing the Worst Zoo In The World
programme.desc: Animals at a struggling zoo in Gaza are in desperate need of aid. Left devastated by war, Khan Younis Zoo was dubbed the ‘worst zoo in the world.' In 2014 Khan Younis Zoo boasted 44 animals now only 15 remain. FOUR PAWS must rapidly swing into action

programme.title: Wild Animal Rescue
programme.sub-title: Sanctuary for Wildlife in the Middle East and the Rhino Crisis
programme.desc: Facing the constant threat of poaching, we meet the team who put their lives on the line to raise orphaned rhinos and return them to the wild and in Jordan, we follow the high stakes mission to give rescued wild animals, an inspiring new home.

programme.title: Close Encounters
programme.desc: As Captain Terauchi and his Japanese airline crew travel across Alaska, they encounter blindingly bright lights flying in their airspace. Could extra-terrestrials be to blame?

programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under
programme.desc: Investigating the disappearance of Australian pilot Frederick Valentich, whose last transmission gives a disturbing account of what he experienced.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: One of the world's best UFO hotspots is very close to home. Craig and Sarah examine the Scottish UFO phenomena — a myriad of extraordinary cases, including the 1991 sighting of a glowing red disc. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Close Encounters
programme.desc: It's 11am at the Westall School in Melbourne, Australia when a classroom of students playing outside see a saucer-shaped object in an adjacent field. But could it be aliens?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: The Alien Disclosure Files is a series that delves into these current and historical unexplained incidents and brings together leading experts in the fields of ufology and the paranormal to try to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: How did a faked human fossil fool experts for half a century? How did a lump of wood and some bits of bent metal become one of Russia's most dangerous weapons? Why did a Victorian genius believe he could make a steam-powered thinking machine?

programme.title: Evidence Of The Unexplained
programme.desc: A mysterious opening caught on camera on the Red Planet – could this be a gateway to a base on Mars? A UFO appears to invade an Amazon village and leaves a trail of victims – and an unidentified craft gate-crashes the Queen's Jubilee celebration.

programme.title: Storm Cell
programme.desc: Storm chaser April, whose parents died in a twister during her childhood, must warn her brother and his unsespecting town of a massive storm heading their way before he meets the same fate.

programme.title: The Love Gala
programme.desc: When planning her mom's Garden Gala, Kate must compromise with the head of the Botanical Garden.

programme.title: May the Best Wedding Win
programme.desc: Tiffany and her frenemy compete over wedding bookings, despite her not having a real fiancé.

MST3K - S06E21 - Beast Of Yucca Flats
Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner… his mom!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Space Yoghurt
programme.desc: Migol, Popodom and Drod bump into unusual problems in space that they manage to solve in equally unusual ways, but at least everything ends well when you can laugh together. Follow the space creatures on their fun and wacky adventures!

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It's countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer's back is turned.

programme.title: Tiny Town
programme.desc: Join the friendly vehicles of Tiny Town as they play games, go on adventures and solve problems together.

programme.title: Roger
programme.desc: The lively adventures of a little girl, the carefree, joyful and occasionally perky Fatou, and an alien, the clumsy Roger, on a tropical island… Throughout their adventures, they trigger small accidents that sometimes grow into major disasters, but (almost) always end on a happy note. In short, Roger and Fatou spend their time saving the island from their own mistakes and blunders.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: RoboFuse - Beach Rescue: Zitron deploys his shark minions to scare the crowd at the beach! Rodeo and Booster must save summer!

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: RoboFuse - Halloween Tricks: Rodeo and Booster's friends dress up for Halloween, but Zitron gets in the way of the fun. Robo to the rescue.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
